title: 2024 Kenworth T880 50-Ton Rotator
description: Custom NRC-built heavy-duty rotator built on a Kenworth T880 chassis. This unit features a 50-ton rotator boom capable of full 360-degree rotation, dual planetary winches, and a full LED lighting package. Spec'd for heavy recovery operations and highway clearing.

title: 2024 Peterbilt 567 35-Ton Integrated
description: NRC custom integrated wrecker on a Peterbilt 567. Built for medium-heavy recovery with a 35-ton integrated boom, hydraulic underlift, and full recovery package. Ready to work out of the box.

title: 2024 International HV607 Flatbed Rollback
description: NRC-built heavy-duty rollback on an International HV607. Aluminum deck, 21-foot steel bed with hydraulic tilt, ideal for transporting disabled vehicles and equipment. Fully air-ride equipped.
